concepts.title: OpenDPP Integration API — overview
concepts.description: What the OpenDPP Integration API does, how it is organised, and where to start.

concepts.title: Authentication & tenancy
concepts.description: Authenticate with a tenant API key as a Bearer token; tenant identity is token-bound.

concepts.title: Error model
concepts.description: Error envelopes returned by the API, including the richer ESPR validation-failure shape.

concepts.title: Rate limits
concepts.description: Per-IP request limits and the response headers that advertise them.

concepts.title: Public access tiers
concepts.description: How one resolution URL serves tiered views via capability tokens (Battery Reg. Art. 77(9)).

concepts.title: Sealing & verification
concepts.description: Apply an eIDAS advanced electronic seal and verify it offline from the redacted document.

concepts.title: Interop: AAS & UNTP credentials
concepts.description: The standards-conformant projections OpenDPP serves alongside JSON-LD, and where to validate them.

concepts.title: Conformance honesty
concepts.description: What OpenDPP's output conforms to today, what is partial, and what is on the roadmap.

concepts.title: Passports
concepts.description: Create, validate, read, update, seal and manage the lifecycle of Digital Product Passports.

concepts.title: Economic Operators
concepts.description: Register and manage the economic operators (manufacturers/brands, identified by EORI or national registry id) that passports are issued on behalf of.

concepts.title: Battery Units
concepts.description: Per-unit battery serialization (real serials, GS1 AI 21) under a SKU-level passport, plus append-only telemetry events (state of health, charge cycles, status changes) per the EU Battery Regulation.

concepts.title: Facilities
concepts.description: Manufacturing facility master data, identified by GS1 GLN-13 (the Unique Facility Identifier).

concepts.title: Access Grants
concepts.description: Capability tokens implementing tiered access (Battery Regulation Art.

concepts.title: Webhooks
concepts.description: Subscribe HTTPS endpoints to passport lifecycle events.

concepts.title: Traceability & Audit
concepts.description: UNTP/EPCIS supply-chain traceability events, lineage queries, and the public seal verifier.

concepts.title: Public Resolution
concepts.description: Unauthenticated, content-negotiated passport resolution: GS1 Digital Link paths, passport and unit pages.

concepts.title: Schemas & Vocabulary
concepts.description: Machine-readable contracts: per-category ESPR JSON Schemas, the W3C JSON-LD context, and the curated materials vocabulary.

concepts.title: QR Codes
concepts.description: Export GS1-Digital-Link QR codes (PNG/SVG, 128–2048 px, GS1 quiet zone) for passports and battery units.

concepts.title: eIDAS Keys
concepts.description: Tenant signing-key management.

concepts.title: Account
concepts.description: Identity of the authenticated API key / session: workspace, role, permissions, operator scope, and passport usage against the tier quota — the integration-facing counterpart to the console's profile endpoints.

concepts.title: Service
concepts.description: Service metadata and liveness.

concepts.title: Identity of the authenticated key / session
concepts.description: Identity of the authenticated key / session

concepts.description: Embedded economic-operator JSON-LD node (public in all tiers).

concepts.title: FastifyDefaultBadRequest
concepts.description: Fastify's default 400 error body, returned when a syntactically malformed JSON request body is rejected by the framework before the handler runs (so none of the handler-built {success:false, ...} shapes apply).

concepts.title: GrantDecisionResponse
concepts.description: Returned by deny and revoke: the updated grant, no token.

concepts.title: GrantIssuedResponse
concepts.description: Returned by direct issuance (201) and request approval (200).

concepts.title: GrantListResponse
concepts.description: List envelope for GET /api/v1/grants (paginated).

concepts.title: GrantRouteError
concepts.description: Error body used by the grants endpoints' route-level errors (400/403/404/409).

concepts.title: GrantRow
concepts.description: Tenant-facing projection of an access grant.

concepts.title: HealthStatus
concepts.description: Health-check body of GET /health.

concepts.title: MaterialVocabularyListResponse
concepts.description: Envelope of GET /api/v1/materials.

concepts.title: MaterialVocabularyRow
concepts.description: One entry of the platform-curated material vocabulary.

concepts.title: MerkleTreeAttestationProof
concepts.description: OpenDPP's own proof type — an eIDAS ADVANCED electronic seal: an ECDSA prime256v1 signature over a SHA-256 Merkle root of the key-sorted metadata (one leaf per top-level metadata key).

concepts.title: OperatorGetResponse

concepts.title: OperatorListResponse
concepts.description: OperatorListResponse

concepts.title: OperatorMinimalError
concepts.description: Minimal error envelope used by the operator/key self-service handlers — note the standard error key is ABSENT (unlike the shared Error schema).

concepts.title: OperatorRow
concepts.description: An economic-operator record (EconomicOperator).

concepts.title: PassportAasEnvironment
concepts.description: IDTA Asset Administration Shell environment (returned when Accept contains application/aas+json), role-filtered for the caller's access tier.

concepts.title: PassportBulkFailure
concepts.description: 400 body of POST /api/v1/passports/bulk when EVERY row failed.

concepts.title: SealCertificateReport

concepts.title: SealTimestampReport
concepts.description: Present only when payload.proof.rfc3161.token was supplied AND verification proceeds past the key-registration and operator-binding gates (the two policy verified: false responses omit it).

concepts.description: Verification request.

concepts.title: SealVerifyResponse
concepts.description: Always HTTP 200 once the request is well-formed.
